headline: Assessing Cooper Companies (COO) Valuation After Activist Pressure And Business Review Shake Up
summary: Activist pressure puts Cooper Companies (COO) under the spotlight Cooper Companies (COO) is drawing fresh investor attention after activist shareholders JANA and Browning West pushed for changes that have already produced a new chairman and a broad review of operations. At the center of this renewed focus is the contrast between the CooperVision contact lens business and the weaker CooperSurgical unit, where past acquisitions have weighed on profitability and free cash flow, prompting...

headline: CooperCompanies Appoints Paul Keel to its Board of Directors
summary: SAN RAMON, Calif., May 04, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CooperCompanies (Nasdaq: COO), a leading global medical device company, announced today that its Board of Directors has appointed Paul Keel as an independent director, effective July 1, 2026. Mr. Keel has also been appointed to serve on the Audit Committee when he joins the Board. “We are delighted to welcome Paul to our Board as a new Director,” said Colleen Jay, Chair of the Board of CooperCompanies. “His experience as a CEO in the medical de
